title: puya harmsii
intro: Puya harmsii, also known as the "Queen of the Andes," is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Puya harmsii include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Puya harmsii is prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
